title: Register a new partner
description: Submit the minimum details the club team needs to review a business for publication.
stepBusinessDescription: Start with the business identity and category.
stepRepresentativeDescription: Tell us who the club team should contact during review.
stepLocationDescription: Add the public location and a website or social profile.
stepReviewDescription: Review the application, complete CAPTCHA, and submit for moderation.
confirmAuthority: I confirm that I represent this business or have the right to submit this application.
acceptLegal: I accept the Partner Rules, Terms of Use, and Privacy Policy.
captchaError: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
rateLimitError: Too many submissions. Please wait and try again.
duplicateError: This business application is already under review.
serverError: Business application could not be submitted. Please try again.
successDescription: Your application was submitted. The business profile will appear in the public directory only after the club team reviews and publishes it.
errorWebsite: Add a website or social link.
errorConfirmAuthority: Confirm the right to submit this application.
errorAcceptLegal: Accept the rules and privacy policy.
